description: Enable admins to invite, manage roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.

userStories.title: Add membership audit-log persistence
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want membership changes stored as audit events so that admin actions are traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create membership audit-log storage with actor, target member, action, and timestamp fields
Store event types for invite_sent, role_changed, and access_revoked

userStories.title: Invite workspace members by email
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new collaborators can join safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can submit a valid email and selected role (viewer, editor, admin) to create invitation
Successful invite creates invite_sent audit event for workspace
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Change workspace member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles so that access level matches responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can change member role between viewer, editor, and admin
Successful role change updates membership and writes role_changed audit event
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoke workspace member access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former collaborators lose workspace access.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can revoke access for existing workspace member
Successful revoke removes access and writes access_revoked audit event
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show recent membership changes in settings audit view
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can audit access updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page shows recent membership audit events ordered newest first
Audit view displays action, actor, target member, and timestamp
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
